sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 40:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 40:1
items.html: Any light should clothe a vessel, and there is no light without a vessel (see “In Passing”). (Part 3, Chapter 12, item 3)
